text:
{"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>5. Bey Herrn Daniel Eckenstein dem Buchdrucker in der Eschemer-Vorstatt sind folgende Bücher zu haben: <BIBL><AUTHOR>Dr. Johann Rambach</AUTHOR> <TITLE>erbauliches Hand-Büchlein für Kinder</TITLE> in <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT></BIBL>. <BIBL><AUTHOR>Johann Arndt</AUTHOR> <TITLE>sechs Geistreiche Bücher vom wahren Christenthum</TITLE></BIBL>; Item <BIBL><AUTHOR>desselben</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Geistreiches Paradys-Gärtlein</TITLE> in <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT></BIBL>. <BIBL><AUTHOR>Johann Hühner</AUTHOR> <TITLE>zweymahl zwey und funffzig auserlesene Biblische Historien aus dem alten und neuen Testament</TITLE> <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Der Gnaden-Schlüssel aller Kinderen GOttes</TITLE> in <FORMAT>12mo</FORMAT></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>die Weege und Wercke GOttes in der Seele</TITLE> in <FORMAT>12mo</FORMAT></BIBL>. Item: <BIBL><TITLE>Ubungen sich stets in der Gegenwart GOttes zu halten</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":9,"explanation":"The following corrections were made:
1. '√ü' (corrupted encoding) → 'ü' in 'Bücher' (main text)
2. '√ü' → 'ü' in 'Büchlein' (first BIBL TITLE)
3. '√ü' → 'ü' in 'für' (first BIBL TITLE)
4. '√≤' → 'o' in '8vo' (FORMAT, first BIBL) — restoring standard bibliographic abbreviation '8vo'
5. '√ü' → 'ü' in 'Bücher' (second BIBL TITLE)
6. Removed erroneous nested opening <BIBL> tag inside the second BIBL entry (before 'desselben'); the second BIBL was missing its closing tag, which is now added after 'Christenthum'
7. '√üc' → 'üc' / 'de√üc selben' → 'desselben' (AUTHOR of third BIBL — corrupted encoding fixed)
8. '√§' → 'ä' in 'Gärtlein' (third BIBL TITLE)
9. '√≤' → 'o' in all remaining '8v√≤' FORMAT fields (three instances: third, fourth BIBL, and last BIBL) — restoring '8vo'
10. '√ü' → 'ü' in 'Hühner' (AUTHOR of fourth BIBL)
11. '√ü' → 'ü' in 'fünffzig' → kept as 'funffzig' per original spelling, only encoding fixed
12. '√ü' → 'ü' in 'Schlüssel' (fifth BIBL TITLE)"}
